name: Winter-Warming Tortellini Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart Dutch oven over medium-low heat, cover and cook the garlic, onion, celery, and carrot in butter for 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
2. Stir in water and chicken bouillon granules. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low; stir in tortellini. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally until the tortellini are tender.
4. Stir in parsley, pepper, and nutmeg. Cover and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Top each serving with cheese.
Per serving: 327 calories (19 percent from protein, 56 percent from carbohydrate, 25 percent from fat), 16 grams protein, 46 grams carbohydrate, 9 grams fat, 50 milligrams cholesterol, 1,223 milligrams sodium.
Exchanges: 1/2 vegetable, 3 bread, 1 meat, 1 fat.
